name: xtyle-calendar-default
title: Xtyle Calendar (default)
description: The built-in fill for the xtyle Calendar component: the mod-zero month grid every app inherits and may override — the header, the weekday row, every day cell, and the day decorations.

markers.data-date: An ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` day cell. The element delegates pointer and keyboard selection off this marker, so a fill that renames it keeps the chrome but loses the behavior.
markers.data-nav: A month step: `prev` or `next`. The element wires the click.
markers.data-title: The month heading; the element's `aria-live` announcement target.
markers.data-body: The row container an update repaints.
